Commons.reset-data-description: Clear all your planner data, courses, and settings. This action cannot be undone.
Commons.reset-data-warning: This will delete all your data permanently!

Onboarding.admission-day-note: This will create sessions from your admission year to today.

PlannerPage.no-course-modif-past-session: No changes allowed for this past session.
PlannerPage.drag-courses-to-add-course: Drag courses here to add them to this session.
PlannerPage.courses-availability-not-yet-published: Information on course availability for this session is not yet published by the school.
PlannerPage.no-courses-found-global: No courses found in any program. Try a different search term.
PlannerPage.session-not-created: Session {session} is not yet created. Please add the year first.

CourseDetailsPage.invalidCourse: Please use a valid course link to view the course details.
CourseDetailsPage.invalidProgram: Please select a valid program to view this course.
CourseDetailsPage.missingDescription: No description is available for this course yet.
CourseDetailsPage.noOfferings: No offering details are available for this course yet.
CourseDetailsPage.noPrerequisites: No prerequisites are listed for this course.
CourseDetailsPage.noPrograms: No programs were found for this course.
CourseDetailsPage.pageDescription: Select a program to load the course requirements and offering details.
CourseDetailsPage.selectProgramHelp: Changing the program reloads the course requirements for that program.

Landing.headline: Plan your ÉTS sessions, simply.
Landing.subheadline: A platform to organize your courses, track your progress, build your academic path, all in one place.

Footer.signature: Made by the ApplETS club at École de technologie supérieure
